subject: Customer refactor request — handled by Claude Opus 4.6 via Claude Code

dialog.body: Hey — my invoice script is throwing a KeyError on 'tax_rate' when the customer is tax-exempt. Can you fix it?
Looking at `src/invoice.py` now — I'll read the function that builds the line items and find the KeyError.
Found it. `build_line_item` assumes every customer record has `tax_rate`. I'll add a default of 0.0 for tax-exempt customers and add a test. Editing now.
Done. Edited `src/invoice.py` lines 47–52 to use `.get('tax_rate', 0.0)`, added a test in `tests/test_invoice.py`, and committed as `def4567890abc123`. The test passes locally. Want me to open a PR?
